actions.script: def result = [ [label: "Active Meetings", value: "ActiveMeetings", target: "ActiveMeetings"], [label: "Meeting History", value: "MeetingHistory", target: "MeetingHistory"] ] ec.web.sendJsonResponse(result)
def result = enumList.collect { [label: it.description, value: it.enumId] } ec.web.sendJsonResponse(result)
def result = statusList.collect { [label: it.description, value: it.statusId] } ec.web.sendJsonResponse(result)

def sd = ec.screen.getScreenDefinition("component://aitree/screen/aitree.xml") def subscreens = [] // Determine active from extra path or default to Home String activeName = sri.screenUrlInfo.extraPathNameList ? sri.screenUrlInfo.extraPathNameList[0] : "Home" Map activeSub = null for (ssi in sd.getSubscreensItemsSorted()) { if (!ssi.menuInclude) continue def sub = [ name: ssi.name, title: ssi.menuTitle ?: ssi.name, path: "/aitree/" + ssi.name, pathWithParams: "/aitree/" + ssi.name, active: ssi.name == activeName ] subscreens.add(sub) if (sub.active) activeSub = sub } def menuData = [[ name: "aitree", title: "Staff Meeting", path: "/aitree", pathWithParams: "/aitree", subscreens: subscreens ]] // Crucial: add active subscreen to breadcrumb list so Vue handles currentPathList/reloadSubscreens correctly if (activeSub) { menuData.add([ name: activeSub.name, title: activeSub.title, path: activeSub.path, pathWithParams: activeSub.pathWithParams ]) } ec.web.sendJsonResponse(menuData)
